title: SimpleDropInventory
description: Automatically drop items into the player's inventory
body:
This plugin offers that the experience is obtained directly to the player regardless of distance and the blocks mined by the user are automatically deposited in the player's inventory.

## Commands:
- /sdi reload
- /sdi drop (Alternate dropping items into inventory or not.)
## Permissions:
- sdi.admin (OP)
- sdi.use
